response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with deep technical breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the resume shows no evidence of formal people management, team leadership, or organizational change leadership — all explicit minimum requirements for this Engineering Manager role. While there is relevant tooling/DevOps experience (CI/CD, GitLab instance maintenance, test frameworks, workshops), it does not substitute for the 2+ years of direct people management required. The role specifically asks for someone who runs 1:1s, sets performance expectations, and develops team roadmaps, none of which appear in the work history.
strengths: 12+ years of software development experience spanning full-stack, embedded, and mobile, exceeding the 8-year minimum
Genuine developer-tooling background: built test runner (Trial), assertion library (Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD infrastructure, and Selenium training curriculum
Strong track record of knowledge sharing through workshops, talks, and course creation — transferable to team development
concerns: No explicit people management or direct-report leadership experience listed in any role
No evidence of leading organizational change or owning team-level roadmaps
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem depth (some iOS/Apple TV work in 2015-2016, but not recent or at platform scale)

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure background
No demonstrated roadmap or org-change leadership
